final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for a domestic financing announcement event about "gpt5.5发布" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a domestic Chinese VC roadshow aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式商务设计 (new Chinese business design), 红杉中国 pitch deck heritage, 真格基金 minimalist presentation tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be standard 16:9 PPT cover layout with title area and speaker credit
Subject: must include "gpt5.5发布" as the event title and "奥特曼" as the speaker name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, confident GP-tier atmosphere — exact tone balance is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "gpt5.5发布" (event title), "奥特曼" (speaker name)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must fit domestic Chinese roadshow conventions and GP presentation standards
Avoid: must avoid Western tech conference clichés, must avoid overly playful or casual elements
